usage: verify_drc [-help] [-area {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...}] [-check_illegal_trim_shapes] [-check_ndr_spacing {true | false | auto}] [-check_only {all | regular | special | selected_net | selected | cell | default}] [-check_reverse] [-check_routing_halo] [-check_same_via_cell] [-check_short_only] [-check_trim_length] [-check_uncolored] [-enable_post_passive_fill_check] [-exclude_pg_net] [-ignore_fill_wire] [-ignore_trial_route] [-layer_range {layer1 [layer2]}] [-limit <max_error>] [-report <file_name>] [-view_window]

options.name: -area
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} Specifies one or more areas to check

options.name: -check_ndr_spacing
options.description: {true | false | auto} Specifies what kind of non-default rule spacing to be checked

options.name: -check_only
options.description: {all | regular | special | selected_net | selected | cell | default} Specifies what kind of shapes to be checked.

options.name: -check_same_via_cell
options.description: Check the cut spacing from the same via

options.name: -check_short_only
options.description: Exclude all DRC check except short.

options.name: -check_trim_length
options.description: Consider max length in the trim shape layer.

options.name: -check_uncolored
options.description: report color change violation when the dpt layer shape is free color.

options.name: -exclude_pg_net
options.description: Excludes the checking of power and ground nets.

options.name: -ignore_fill_wire
options.description: Ignore metalfill wires when check drc.

options.name: -ignore_trial_route
options.description: Ignore trial route when check drc.

options.name: -layer_range
options.description: Checks between the range of metal layers including cut layers in between

options.name: -limit
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file that contains the violations informations
